name: klayout

metadata.name: klayout
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)

documentation:
This package is a standalone distribution of KLayout's Python API.

For more details see here: https://www.klayout.org/klayout-pypi

modules.name: pymod.distutils_src.pya
documentation: pull everything from the generic klayout.pya package into pya

classes.name: pymod.distutils_src.pya.PCellDeclarationHelper
documentation: establish the PCellDeclarationHelper using the mixin provided by _pcell_declaration_helper

variables.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.cls.__getstate__
documentation: type: ignore

variables.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.cls.__setstate__
documentation: type: ignore

classes.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.PCellDeclarationHelper
documentation: establish the PCellDeclarationHelper using the mixin provided by _pcell_declaration_helper

classes.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperLayerDescriptor
documentation: A descriptor object which translates the PCell parameters into class attributes

classes.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperParameterDescriptor
documentation:
A descriptor object which translates the PCell parameters into class attributes

In some cases (i.e. can_convert_from_shape), these placeholders are not 
connected to real parameters (obj._param_values is None). In this case,
the descriptor acts as a value holder (self.value)

classes.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.__init__
documentation: initializes this instance

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.param
documentation:
Defines a parameter
  name         -> the short name of the parameter
  type         -> the type of the parameter
  description  -> the description text
named parameters
  hidden      -> (boolean) true, if the parameter is not shown in the dialog
  readonly    -> (boolean) true, if the parameter cannot be edited
  unit        -> the unit string
  min_value   -> the minimum value (only effective for numerical types and if no choices are present)
  max_value   -> the maximum value (only effective for numerical types and if no choices are present)
  default     -> the default value
  tooltip     -> tool tip text
  choices     -> ([ [ d, v ], ...) choice descriptions/value for choice type
this method defines accessor methods for the parameters
  {name}       -> read accessor
  set_{name}   -> write accessor ({name}= does not work because the
                  Ruby confuses that method with variables)
  {name}_layer -> read accessor for the layer index for TypeLayer parameters

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.display_text
documentation:
Reimplementation of PCellDeclaration.display_text

This function delegates the implementation to self.display_text_impl
after configuring the PCellDeclaration object.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.get_parameters
documentation:
Reimplementation of PCellDeclaration.get_parameters

This function uses the collected parameters to feed the 
PCell declaration.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin._get_values
documentation:
Gets the temporary parameter values used for the current evaluation

Call this function to get the a current parameter values. This 
is an array of variants in the order the parameters are declared.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin._init_values
documentation:
initializes the temporary parameter values for the current evaluation

"values" are the original values. If "None" is given, the
default values will be used. 
"layers" are the layer indexes corresponding to the layer
parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin._start
documentation:
Is called to prepare the environment for an operation
After the operation, "_finish" must be called.
This method will push the state onto a stack, hence implementing
reentrant implementation methods.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin._finish
documentation: Is called at the end of an implementation of a PCellDeclaration method

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin._reset_state
documentation: Resets the internal state

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.get_layers
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.get_layers.

Gets the layer definitions from all layer parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.callback
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.callback (change state on parameter change)

The function delegates the implementation to callback_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.coerce_parameters
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.coerce parameters (make consistent)

The function delegates the implementation to coerce_parameters_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.produce
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.produce (produces the layout)

The function delegates the implementation to produce_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.can_create_from_shape
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.can_create_from_shape

The function delegates the implementation to can_create_from_shape_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.transformation_from_shape
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.transformation_from_shape

The function delegates the implementation to transformation_from_shape_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.

methods.name: pymod.distutils_src.klayout.db.pcell_declaration_helper._PCellDeclarationHelperMixin.parameters_from_shape
documentation:
Reimplements PCellDeclaration.parameters_from_shape

The function delegates the implementation to parameters_from_shape_impl
after updating the state of this object with the current parameters.
